use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF AQUEOUS HUMOR FORMATION AND INTRAOCULAR PRESSURE
COSOPT IS INDICATED FOR THE REDUCTION OF ELEVATED INTRAOCULAR PRESSURE IN PATIENTS WITH OPEN-ANGLE GLAUCOMA OR OCULAR HYPERTENSION WHO ARE INSUFFICIENTLY RESPONSIVE TO BETA BLOCKERS

indications.text:
COSOPT is indicated for the reduction of elevated intraocular pressure in patients with open-angle
glaucoma or ocular hypertension who are insufficiently responsive to beta-blockers (failed to achieve
target IOP determined after multiple measurements over time). The IOP-lowering of COSOPT b.i.d. was...
